name: Atlassian Jira Cloud Skill
description: Atlassian Jira Cloud CRUD skill — manage issues, comments, attachments, workflow transitions, and JQL search via Jira REST API v3 with email + API token auth.
review: Comprehensive Jira Cloud CRUD operations. Excellent SKILL.md with examples for every command. Strong security practices (no secret leakage, path traversal prevention, rate limiting). First Jira skill in the ecosystem. Production-ready.
